meta.title: Dr. Jorge Arce — Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery · v13 Bennett
meta.description: Board-certified oral & maxillofacial surgeon. Twenty-seven years between Colombia and California on the reconstructions other surgeons refer out.

sections.eyebrow: Oral & maxillofacial surgery for the patients and practices of the South Bay
sections.title:
Global rigor.
Local hands.
sections.body: Dr. Jorge Arce trained in Colombia and built his life's work in California — twenty-seven years devoted entirely to oral and maxillofacial surgery and dental implantology. Board certified. Founder of the Dental Implants Center of South Bay, est. 2007. Difficult work, done with care, gives people their lives back.

cols.q: I had been told by two surgeons it was impossible. Dr. Arce took the time no one else did. I can eat, smile, and speak again.
Calm, precise, and genuinely kind. He explained every step until I understood. The result speaks for itself.
Years of pain, gone. I only wish I had found him sooner.
When a case is beyond what I can handle, Jorge is the first call I make. My patients always come back grateful — and so do I.
I refer my most complex cases to Dr. Arce without hesitation. Twenty-seven years shows.
Reliable, communicative, and surgically excellent. A full report back, every time.
The most thorough and honest surgeon I have ever met. He treated my father like family.
I was terrified of the procedure. He never rushed me. Best decision I have made for my health.
The level of care and follow-up is rare. My patients trust him, and that trust reflects back on my practice.

rows.nm: When Not to Operate: Judgment in Oral Surgery

sections.title: Let's <t>restore.</t>
